acceptanceCriteria: .rigor/rigor-ci.cjs is byte-identical to the committed dist/rigor.cjs at the pull request head
the refreshed verifier passes a local gate run against origin/main..HEAD before the pull request is opened
CHANGELOG.md gains an Unreleased entry describing the verifier refresh
the recorded required check git diff --check passes; npm run test:all, npm run bench, and claude plugin validate . --strict are rerun and reported in the pull request
note: Policy permits transmission; minimize content and re-check destination controls.
